title: Glitz Pink & Silver Birthday Badge - Stunning It's My Birthday Design - Perfect Celebration Accessory - 1 Pc
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Stand out on your special day with this glitz pink & silver birthday badge, featuring a stunning "it's my birthday" design that adds a touch of sophistication to any celebration outfit.
DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from high-quality materials, this birthday badge is built to last throughout your entire birthday event, ensuring you can wear it with confidence all day and night.
PERFECT CELEBRATION ACCESSORY: Elevate your birthday experience with this essential party item, making it the perfect accessory to showcase your birthday status and create memorable photos.
EASY TO USE: With a convenient pin-back attachment, this birthday badge easily attaches to clothing or accessories without hassle, allowing you to celebrate in style without any fuss.

GIFT-WORTHY PRESENTATION: Delivered as 1 pc in a stylish packaging, this glitz pink & silver birthday badge makes for an ideal gift for friends and family members celebrating their birthdays, ensuring they'll feel extra special on their big day.
